zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett於1448年出生在英國諾福爾可時，她的父親Sir John Barton Blennerhasset25歲，母親Jane Margaret Heigham23歲。她於1475年與Robert Whetnall Warner在英國諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年11月20日在英國諾福爾可貝斯索普享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett于1448年出生在英国諾福爾可时，她的父亲Sir John Barton Blennerhasset25岁，母亲Jane Margaret Heigham23岁。她于1475年与Robert Whetnall Warner在英国諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1488年11月20日在英国諾福爾可貝斯索普享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blennerhassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Barton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name from any of the numerous places in England so called from Old English bere ‘barley’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett was born in 1448, in Norfolk, England, her father, Sir John Barton Blennerhasset, was 25 and her mother, Jane Margaret Heigham, was 23. She married Robert Whetnall Warner in 1475, in Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 November 1488, in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett est née en 1448, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Barton Blennerhasset, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane Margaret Heigham, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Whetnall Warner en 1475, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 novembre 1488, à Besthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett 1448 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Barton Blennerhasset 25 und ihre Mutter Jane Margaret Heigham 23. Sie hat 1475 in Norfolk, England Robert Whetnall Warner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. November 1488 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Besthorpe, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett è nata il nel 1448 nel Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir John Barton Blennerhasset, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jane Margaret Heigham, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Robert Whetnall Warner nel 1475, nel Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 novembre 1488, nel Besthorpe, Norfolk, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassettが1448年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir John Barton Blennerhassetは25歳，母Jane Margaret Heighamは23歳であった。1475年にイギリスノーフォルクでRobert Whetnall Warnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年11月20日にイギリスノーフォルクベスソルペで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett(이)가 1448년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Barton Blennerhasset(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Margaret Heigham(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 노르폴크에서 Robert Whetnall Warner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 11월 20일 영국 노르폴크 베스소에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett nasceu em 1448, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Barton Blennerhasset, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane Margaret Heigham, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Whetnall Warner em 1475, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1488, em Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett родилась в 1448 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Barton Blennerhasset было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Margaret Heigham, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Whetnall Warner в 1475 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 ноября 1488 г. в местности бестаурп, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Barton Blennerhassett nació en 1448, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Barton Blennerhasset, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jane Margaret Heigham, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Robert Whetnall Warner en 1475, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1488, en Besthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
